brief_justification: Correct answer with valid reasoning; References Knobe Effect and explains multi-level why people judge this way; No explicit self-monitoring or bias checking; Mentions research backing but doesn't verify against alternative interpretations; Acknowledges the distinction between goal and foreseen side effect; Briefly contrasts desired outcome vs knowingly caused harm but doesn't systematically evaluate the 'No' position; Shows reasoning chain but doesn't fully trace from premises to conclusion with all intermediate steps
